title: FCC Catches a US Drone Vendor Lying About Possible DJI-Created Product
summary: On Tuesday, the FCC announced a “national security enforcement action” against Odyssey as part of its effort to enforce the foreign-made drone ban . “Our drone revocation proceeding sends a message that the FCC will not allow companies that produce abroad to…
